extraction.one_line_summary: KING Benjamin attacked alone on uncategorized pre-climb section before final ascent, survived brutal 12% gradient zone to win by 48 seconds over solo chaser Moinard.
tactical_patterns: Mate initiated early break despite holding polka-dot jersey; De Gendt waved him through, appearing to protest perceived bullying tactics.
King attacked on uncategorized pre-climb section before official climb started, gaining decisive advantage when gradient hit 9-12% zone.
GC group passive until final kilometers when Kelderman pushed hardest, not defending leader Yates, revealing Sunweb's dual leadership.

rider_signals.KING Benjamin: positive: survived solo through 12% gradient zone after attacking pre-climb, won second stage confirming breakaway specialization wasn't random
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Bauke: positive: pushed hardest among GC favorites to line despite not being team leader, suggesting strongest legs in red jersey group
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: retained red jersey but teammates pushed harder, indicating potential vulnerability or team strategy confusion
rider_signals.ZAGHIRI Yoann: positive: claimed no strength pre-stage but present in final GC selection, suggesting sandbagging or tactical misdirection
rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: negative: waved Mate through at KOM sprint in apparent protest gesture, prioritizing politics over points collection
